pages.text: var videos = [ { img: 'https://lain.bgm.tv/pic/cover/l/0e/1e/218971_2y351.jpg', title: '朝花夕誓——于离别之朝束起约定之花', status: '已追完', progress: 100, jp: 'さよならの朝に約束の花をかざろう', time: '放送时间: 2018-02-24 SUN.', desc: ' 住在远离尘嚣的土地，一边将每天的事情编织成名为希比欧的布，一边静静生活的伊欧夫人民。在15岁左右外表就停止成长，拥有数百年寿命的他们，被称为“离别的一族”，并被视为活着的传说。没有双亲的伊欧夫少女玛奇亚，过着被伙伴包围的平稳日子，却总感觉“孤身一人”。他们的这种日常，一瞬间就崩溃消失。追求伊欧夫的长寿之血，梅萨蒂军乘坐着名为雷纳特的古代兽发动了进攻。在绝望与混乱之中，伊欧夫的第一美女蕾莉亚被梅萨蒂带走，而玛奇亚暗恋的少年克里姆也失踪了。玛奇亚虽然总算逃脱了，却失去了伙伴和归去之地……。' }, { img : 'https://lain.bgm.tv/pic/cover/l/0e/1e/218971_2y351.jpg', title: '朝花夕誓——于离别之朝束起约定之花', status: '已追完', progress: 100, jp: 'さよならの朝に約束の花をかざろう', time: '2018-02-24 SUN.', desc: ' posts.title: 近期学习内容-2023春
posts.text: #近期学习内容 先把深度学习入门了：https://space.bilibili.com/1567748478 然后去油管看看台大的深度学习课程：https://speech.ee.ntu.edu.tw/~hylee/ml/2022-spring.php 完成前两项的同时看一看 《多媒体安全基础导论》 后话（吐槽）： 从来没有想过我会入深度学习的坑，所以假期也没想着看相关内容。呜呜呜，本想着去看一看隐写相关的研究，最后交流了一下才知道不管什么方向都和机器学习有些关联，所以只好现在硬着头皮把这东西尽快看完，上百节课的东西，实在是做不出计划来，只能尽快看了。 其实主要还是因为大二下学期的课程实在是太无聊了（不等于简单）才想多看看别的东西，要么就是文科课要么就是硬件课：这信号与系统和电子线路有啥可学的啊，一点用都没有，计嵌更是重量级，纯纯文科课，比我上学期上的计算机网络还恶心，最后最后还有依托量物答辩要吃，烦人啊：（（（（（ 还好当初没给这学期额外选课，只按照培养方案来学习，要不然真吃不消了。现在四周过去课内已经烂掉了，除了信息论B一直在学以外剩下的都是草草应付作业了事，希望接下来的几个月能好一些吧。。 私のNPYはどうですか？私のPAPERはどうですか？私のGPAはどうですか？私のFLAGはどうですか？

posts.title: RoarCTF2019 Misc/davinci_cipher
posts.text: #davinci_cipher 一个flag.txt和k3y.pcapng文件 txt打开是：  百度后发现好像是emoji编码，然后就不知道能干啥了 然后分析pcapng文件，发现tcp流里没啥可用的信息，但能看到一堆USB协议的包，并且能看到是来自wacom数位板的信息，用以下指令提取 tshark -r 'k3y.pcapng' -T fields -e usbhid.data|sed '/^$/d' > data.txt 随便百度了一下怎么分析wacom的usb协议文件，然后写一个脚本 import numpy import matplotlib.pyplot as plt data=[] with open('data.txt',"r") as file: for line in file.readlines(): if line[16:18]!="00": data.append(line) X=[] Y=[] for line in data: x0=int(line[4:6],16) x1=int(line[6:8],16) x=x0+x1*256 y0=int(line[10:12],16) y1=int(line[12:14],16) y=y0+y1*256 X.append(x) Y.append(-y) figure=plt.figure() pic=figure.add_subplot(111) pic.set_title("picture") pic.scatter(X,Y,c='r',marker='.') plt.show() 得到了这张图片 文字信息就是MONA_LISA_IS_A_MAN，直接当flag输入发现不对，然后就不知道该干什么了 后来百度后才发现原来还有emoji密码这种玩意（真踏马够离谱。。），先找个网站(https://r12a.github.io/app-conversion/ )把编码转化成emoji表情再找个解码网站(https://aghorler.github.io/emoji-aes/#decrypt )把emoji当密文，MONA_LISA_IS_A_MAN当密钥解出flag RoarCTF{wm-m0de3n_dav1chi} 个人总结：分析完wacom的usb协议文件后这题就没什么价值了，后面甚至不如做社工。

posts.title: 2020网鼎杯 Jocker Wp
posts.text: #学习向wp 查无壳后放入IDA，无法用F5进行反编译，并有如下报错 经过学习后，了解到是由于堆栈不平衡导致的(https://blog.csdn.net/qq_39539312/article/details/82834004)在Options->General中打开Stack pointer后找到报错的0x401838后发现call near ptr前后的指针位置不同，且retn不为00。 在00401833和00401847两个call的位置用Alt+k修改DIFFERENCE between old and new SP的值为0，然后retn为00，可以F5进行反编译。 然后可以得到以下代码： int __cdecl main(int argc, const char **argv, const char **envp) { char Source; // [esp+12h] [ebp-96h] char Dest; // [esp+44h] [ebp-64h] DWORD flOldProtect; // [esp+94h] [ebp-14h] size_t v7; // [esp+98h] [ebp-10h] int i; // [esp+9Ch] [ebp-Ch] __main(); puts("please input you flag:"); if ( VirtualProtect(encrypt, 0xC8u, 4u, &flOldProtect) == 0 ) exit(1); scanf("%40s", &Source); v7 = strlen(&Source); if ( v7 != 24 ) { puts("Wrong!"); exit(0); } strcpy(&Dest, &Source); wrong(&Source); omg(&Source); for ( i = 0; i <= 186; ++i ) *((_BYTE *)encrypt + i) ^= 0x41u; if ( encrypt(&Dest) != 0 ) finally(&Dest); return 0; } 关键点应该是wrong和omg以及finally，还有一个未知的encrypt不知道是什么。。 wrong: char *__cdecl wrong(char *a1) { char *result; // eax signed int i; // [esp+Ch] [ebp-4h] for ( i = 0; i <= 23; ++i ) { if ( i & 1 ) { result = &a1[i]; a1[i] -= i; } else { result = &a1[i]; a1[i] ^= i; } } return result; } omg: int __cdecl omg(char *a1) { int result; // eax int v2[24]; // [esp+18h] [ebp-80h] int i; // [esp+78h] [ebp-20h] int v4; // [esp+7Ch] [ebp-1Ch] v4 = 1; qmemcpy(v2, &unk_4030C0, sizeof(v2)); for ( i = 0; i <= 23; ++i ) { if ( a1[i] != v2[i] ) v4 = 0; } if ( v4 == 1 ) result = puts("hahahaha_do_you_find_me?"); else result = puts("wrong ~~ But seems a little program"); return result; } final: char __userpurge finally@<al>(char a1@<cf>, char a2@<al>, _BYTE *a3@<edi>, _BYTE *a4@<esi>, char *a5, int a6, int a7, int a8, int a9, int a10, int a11, int a12, int a13, int a14, int a15, int a16, int a17, int a18, int a19, int a20, int a21, int a22, int a23, int a24, int a25, int a26, int a27, int a28, int a29, int a30, int a31, int a32, int a33, int a34, int a35, int a36, int a37, int a38, int a39, int a40, int a41, int a42, int a43, int a44, int a45, int a46, int a47, int a48, int a49, int a50, int a51, int a52, int a53, int a54, int a55, int a56, int a57, int a58, int a59, int a60, int a61, int a62, int a63) { char result; // al result = a1 + a2 - 56; *a3 = *a4; return result; } 导出数组： unsigned char unk_4030C0[] = { 0x66,0x6B,0x63,0x64,0x7F,0x61,0x67,0x64, 0x3B,0x56,0x6B,0x61,0x7B,0x26,0x3B,0x50, 0x63,0x5F,0x4D,0x5A,0x71,0x0C,0x37,0x66 }; 用wrong和omg反解出一个flag: flag{fak3_alw35_sp_me!!} 提交后发现是个假的，然后就不知道咋么办了。。

posts.title: 资源网站整理
posts.text: #整理一些常用的资源网站 ##同时用来测试该分类是否成功配置 ###注：全部网站均为转载，非笔者本人所有 用于CTF学习的: CTF-wiki: https://ctf-wiki.org/ buuoj: https://buuoj.cn/ CTFHub: https://www.ctfhub.com/ picoCTF: https://picoctf.org/ 用于校内课程学习的: 网安大礼包: home.ustc.edu.cn/~yssickjgd/ 评课社区: https://www.icourse.club/ 矩阵计算器: https://matrix.reshish.com/zh/matrixMethod.php/ WolframAlpha: https://www.wolframalpha.com/ 用于找资源的: 免费音频资源: https://tool.liumingye.cn/music/#/ 动漫网站: www.996dm.com/ 动漫论坛网站: https://myself-bbs.com/portal.php/ mac软件资源: https://www.mac69.com/

posts.title: idekCTF Misc/pyjail
posts.text: #Misc/pyjail 第一次看到pyjail类的题，没做出来，先记录一下留个印象…这题把一堆符号给ban了就很烦… Write-up:https://hackmd.io/@crazyman/H1s0b1Hii 留个知乎大佬的pyjail入门指南:https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/578966149

posts.title: idekCTF Osint/Osint Crime Confusion 1:W as in Where
posts.text: #Osint Crime Confusion 1:W as in Where （菜菜，只做出了一个社工呜呜呜，强行依靠这个丰富一下主页） 先看网站上给出的提示： Someone has died unexpectedly. The police is on it, but between you and me, I cannot wait for the police. I am a private investigator and I need your help. Unfortunately, we might be tracked so I cannot give you the information directly. Start in a major social network. Certainly not a problem for the best hacker I know right…? Alright here goes a beautiful poem: Some people in weird ways were connectedSome were a triangle, some were less directedFor one night they all metAt doctor’s Jonathan Abigdail the third they weptThings were said, threats in the airA few days later someone is deadWho is that someone? That is for you to find,Also who is the killer, if you really don’t mind. 于是直接在谷歌上搜了一下doctor’s Jonathan Abigdail the third，发现什么都找不到，然后搜了下dr.Jonathan Abigdail III，幸运的找到了一个有关的Instagram账号https://www.instagram.com/abigdail3djohn/ 点进去发现这个人只发了一张眼睛的图片，以及图片说明： Now imagin you could INK IT!That is right, at the famous convention for the eye yours truly is presenting!Hopefully reunited with a lot of old friends to see it!The hashtag is #TheEye12tothe3isthekeytoBEyousee?Get HYPEEEED 接下来点进#TheEye12tothe3isthekeytoBEyousee这个tag，发现了另一个人https://www.instagram.com/hjthepainteng/的账号，账号描述他来自于一个看起来很可疑的大学： Study and Teached blue birds at the University of Dutch ThE of Topics in Science (UThE_TS) 结合之前是在社交媒体中找到的线索，所以猜测这里的blue birds指的是twitter，所以我去twitter搜了一下UThE_TS，发现了一个账号https://twitter.com/UThE_TS，然后就没有然后了，根据confusion 2的描述，这个账号应该是在第二题中会有用，第一题大概没啥用。 回到instagram，看刚才那个人(@hjhepainteng)发的另一张水滴的照片，照片描述： I do not know what happened, only 3 days after that stupid eye convention you appear dead. Only if there was someone that could find what happened. I only hope you know that you died somewhere after the best performance ever at the great_paintball_portugal competition. I write this still there, arranging for moving your body back home. Farewell. I love you. Also they said they would sell something on ebay for you <3 捕捉到了关键信息应该是great_paintball_portugal和ebay，所以直接去ebay搜了一下great_paintball_portugal，但是什么也没有得到，后来去谷歌搜索了great_paintball_portugal，找到底下搜索结果有一个ebay的链接：https://www.ebay.com/usr/great_paintball_portugal，点进去发现了： AboutSo after the death we actually decided instead of selling just to make a little rip post at https: franparrefrancisco.wixsite.com/great-paintball-pt. We do not want the blog post to be very obvious though because of the publicity.Location: PortugalMember since: May 12, 2022 于是我就打开了https://franparrefrancisco.wixsite.com/great-paintball-pt这个网站，发现什么都没有，点击learn more也没什么反应，搜索框里也得不到什么有用的信息，然后就思考了一下We do not want the blog post to be very obvious though because of the publicity.这句话，就试了试搜索rip和blog以及post，也没啥结果。最后我尝试把网址改成https://franparrefrancisco.wixsite.com/great-paintball-pt/post，得到了隐藏的网页，内容是： *Death at the Great Paintball Portugal of Heather JamesYes, we are sad to confirm that yesterday one athlete by the name Heather James was killed. Authorities are investigating as we speak as are YOU, the reader, I hope. We confirm that it was indeed here at idek{TGPP_WCIYD}.* 最终得到flag。

posts.title: Test
posts.text: ##测试文本 本文章只用来测试编写博客以及各项需要的功能 def helloworld(): print('Hello World!') helloworld()
